title_block_pattern: Stage 4 — Patient Journey | Evidence-Based Neurological Examination

This checklist guides the Fellow through a structured neurological examination for Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD). The focus is on standardised scoring, phenotype identification, and selection of appropriate validated assessment instruments.

section_patterns.typical_title: 🟣 FNON NOTE: Map network scores to phenotype for FNON-based montage and protocol selection
Map network scores to identify dominant dysfunction pattern for FNON montage selection.
Map examination findings to FNON phenotype and network hypothesis for montage selection.
